content:
Good question — logo creation hasn't been scoped into Phase 11's current task list. The completed tasks so far have focused on strategy, ads, analytics, and campaign launch — brand identity assets like a logo weren't part of this phase's workflow.

I'll flag this to EVE so we can determine whether to add it as a task in this phase or schedule it for an upcoming one.
wasnt it supposed to be in an earlier phase?

Honestly, I don't have visibility into what was planned or promised in earlier phases — I only have full context for Phase 11. If you were told a logo would be delivered in a prior phase and it wasn't, that's a dropped ball that needs to be tracked down.

Let me escalate this to EVE to investigate what happened and get it resolved.
